title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's AI co-scientist system automates medical discovery and hypothesis generation, identifying novel treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, vision loss, and liver fibrosis. The system uses self-ranking mechanisms and has matched or exceeded human expert performance in drug discovery workflows.
